key_themes: Imminent copper assay results from Morocco drilling
Strong trading volume and recent price gains
Director and investor share purchases showing confidence
Speculative near-term upside in micro-cap stock
summary: Critical Mineral Resources (CMRS.L), a micro-cap explorer focused on copper and other critical minerals in Morocco, is experiencing positive sentiment driven by imminent assay results from its recent drilling program. X chatter over the past few days highlights rising volume, a "blue day" pushing toward 3p, director buys, a tight register, and expectations it could retest the 5.25p yearly high. While the stock is highly speculative with prior chairman changes and typical junior miner volatility, current investor discussion is optimistic ahead of near-term newsflow.
sources: ~12 relevant recent X posts (#CMRS, April 2026), Yahoo Finance and Proactive Investors news/drilling updates, Director purchase RNS notifications (2025), LSE share chat and Investing.com coverage
